## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I performed a self-review
- [ ] Type-check passes
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] I manually tested this in Obsidian
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md is updated if this is user-facing

## Security checklist

- [ ] No new tool with `destructiveHint` defaults to allow
- [ ] No new secret-bearing environment variable
- [ ] Audit log captures any new state-changing action
- [ ] Threat model updated if attack surface changed
